releaseNotes: New: movies/shows with no poster art from your provider now fall back to a TMDB-matched poster automatically, in Movies, TV Shows, and My List. Fix: the fallback wasn't actually matching anything at first - provider titles often carry a release year or quality/language tag baked into the name itself (e.g. "4K-EN - Deep Water (2022)"), which TMDB's search doesn't tolerate; the title is now cleaned before searching. Fix: after viewing a movie or show's info page from My List and backing out, focus could get stranded on the back button, making it impossible to pick another title without fully leaving and re-entering My List.
